mapper.insert: INSERT INTO space_axis_y ( parameter_id, dimension_index, count, resolution, unit, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{parameterId}, #{dimensionIndex}, #{count}, #{resolution}, #{unit}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt} )
mapper.select: SELECT id, parameter_id AS parameterId, dimension_index AS dimensionIndex, count, resolution, unit, created_at AS createdAt, updated_at AS updatedAt FROM space_axis_y WHERE id = #{id}

SELECT id, parameter_id AS parameterId, dimension_index AS dimensionIndex, count, resolution, unit, created_at AS createdAt, updated_at AS updatedAt FROM space_axis_y WHERE parameter_id = #{parameterId}
